copy.label: Copy
copy.detail: The recipient gets a full copy they can edit freely. No sync with your changes.

subscribe.label: Subscribe
subscribe.detail: Recipients stay in sync with your deck. They cannot edit but always have the latest.

snapshot.label: Snapshot
snapshot.desc: Users get read-only copy, no updates
snapshot.detail: A frozen read-only copy at the current moment. No future updates.

shareDeck.title: Share Deck
shareDeck.subtitle: Share this deck privately via an invite link
shareDeck.linkHint: Anyone with this link can accept the invite and get access to the deck.
shareDeck.noShares: No shares yet. Generate an invite link above.

revokeAlert.title: Revoke Access
revokeAlert.message: Are you sure you want to revoke this share?

unsubscribeAlert.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribeAlert.message: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from this deck?

myShares.title: My Shares
myShares.emptySentTitle: You haven't shared any decks yet.
myShares.emptySentHint: Go to a deck and tap "Share" to create an invite link.
myShares.emptyReceived: No one has shared a deck with you yet.

publish.subtitle: Share your deck with the community
publish.publishedMessage: Your deck is now available on the marketplace.
